topic: Area using unit tiles with fractional side lengths
latex:
A section of a floor is covered by square tiles as shown in the image below. Each square tile has a side length of $\frac{1}{3}$ foot. What is the area, in square feet, of the section of the floor shown? Express your answer as a fraction or mixed number.

[DIAGRAM]

The diagram shows a grid of square tiles that is 5 tiles wide and 4 tiles tall, with each tile having side length $\frac{1}{3}$ ft.
